title: Al Tamari headlines Jordan's squad｜FIFA World Cup 2026
original_text:
Yazan Al Naimat misses out, but Ehsan Haddad included in Jordan coach Jamal Sellami's 26-strong FIFA World Cup squad.
The Jordan Football Association (JFA) has announced its official squad of 26 players for the FIFA World Cup 2026™, headlined by star forward Mousa Al Tamari.
The Nashama will be missing influential striker Yazan Al Naimat, who suffered a knee injury at last year's FIFA Arab Cup™, but captain Ehsan Haddad was named having recovered after nearly a year on the sidelines. Unfortunately, a late injury has ruled out promising young striker Ibrahim Sabra, who originally made the squad.
Jordan's World Cup squadJordan's World Cup squad
GoalkeepersGoalkeepers
Yazid Abulaila Abdallah Al Fakhouri Nour Bani Attiah
DefendersDefenders
Mohammad Abualnadi Husam Abu Dahab Mohammad Abu Hashish Mohannad Abu Taha Yazan Al Arab Saed Al Rosan Anas Badawi Abdallah Nasib Ehsan Haddad Saleem Obaid
MidfieldersMidfielders
Mohammad Al Dawoud Nizar Al Rashdan Noor Al Rawabdeh Rajaei Ayed Amer Jamous Ibrahim Sadeh
ForwardsForwards
Mohammad Abu Zraiq Mousa Al Tamari Ali Azaizeh Odeh Fakhoury Ali Olwan Mahmoud Almardi
Sellami: Facing Messi is a unique experienceSellami: Facing Messi is a unique experience
Young talents supplement Al Tamari threatYoung talents supplement Al Tamari threat
Talisman Al Tamari scored seven goals and provided 11 assists in 36 league and cup games for Rennes this season, as well as finding the net seven times for his country in the Asian qualifiers for the World Cup.
The list also includes some promising young strikers, including Ali Azaizeh and Odeh Fakhoury.
Jordan will ramp up their final preparations with a friendly against Colombia on 7 June, before competing in Group J along with Austria, Algeria and Argentina.
Jordan's World Cup 2026 fixtures and groupJordan's World Cup 2026 fixtures and group
16 June: Austria v Jordan - San Francisco Bay Area Stadium
22 June: Jordan v Algeria - San Francisco Bay Area Stadium
27 June: Jordan v Argentina – Dallas Stadium
